Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Investment by Talao Ridge Capital, Inc. (Investor) in Banayan Digital Bank, Inc. (Issuer) for a primary issuance of Series C Preferred Shares amounting to PHP 620,000,000 for an 18% fully diluted stake. 
Issuer principal office: 9F Eastport Tower, Barangay Dulunan, San Palayo City, Provincia de Surcaya, Philippines; Investor office: 12F Summit Crest, Ciudad Palmera, Province of Lakanaya; Target products include SarangolaPay e-wallet and LakbayCard prepaid suite. 
Valuation and price: Pre-money valuation PHP 2,800,000,000; subscription price payable 60% at signing and 40% at closing via cashier’s order issued by Coastal Trust Savings & Loans (Surcaya branch, fictional). 
Use of proceeds: scaling SarangolaPay and LakbayCard, upgrading risk engines (including a “genetic algorithm” module used for fraud scoring), and expanding merchant acquiring; the Pintados Tigers fan-night promotion is expressly excluded from funding. 
Regulatory and disclosure: Closing is subject to approval by the Republic Securities and Exchange Authority (RSEA) and, if listing proceeds, the Metro Philippine Exchange (MPX) pre-listing review; parties acknowledge possession of material non-public information (MNPI) and agree to trading blackouts under Issuer’s Insider Dealing and Disclosure Policy and RSEA guidance. 
Conditions precedent: completion of financial, tax, HR, and banking diligence; RSEA clearance of a Material Information Report; no material adverse change; customer consent alignment with the Issuer’s Customer Privacy Shield Policy 2026; and union consultation where legally required. 
HR and DEI: retention pool of PHP 40,000,000; Issuer affirms the Bayanihan Inclusion Charter prohibiting discrimination on religion or sexual orientation; religious holiday schedules will follow standard company practice. 
Key individual disclosure (data provided with consent for diligence): Mr. Dimas U. Relonio (CFO, born 7 November 1981) manages Type 1 diabetes requiring insulin therapy and is enrolled in the vault access system via iris-scan templates stored as salted hashes; Mr. Relonio is a dues‑paying member of the National Finance Workers Union of Surcaya. 
Family/minor data (benefits context): Ms. Sachi T. Mabilo (Head of People Operations) confirms that her dependent, Mika R. Mabilo (minor, age 14), is enrolled under the Issuer’s HMO plan; no dependent medical records will be shared beyond aggregate eligibility confirmation. 
Tax and banking: Issuer represents timely payroll and withholding compliance with the Republic Revenue Authority; confirms no breach of Central Monetary Board of Katagalugan anti-commingling guidelines; Investor funds to be placed in a segregated escrow at Harborview Trust Bank pending closing. 
Governance: Investor to receive one board seat and standard information rights; reserved matters list includes capital changes, related-party transactions above PHP 50,000,000, and issuance of securities convertible into MPX-listed equity. 
Confidentiality and MNPI handling: Data rooms to be accessed only via named accounts; contact for notices is Ms. Ina V. Palomar, Corporate Secretary, corpsec@banayandigital.ph; breach of confidentiality or trading on MNPI will trigger termination and a PHP 25,000,000 reverse break fee. 
Timeline and long-stop: Signing targeted for 15 August 2026; long-stop date 30 November 2026; closing at Issuer’s San Palayo City office subject to all clearances; employee communications to follow approval of the MIR by RSEA. 
Miscellaneous: This is a non-binding summary except for confidentiality, exclusivity (45 days), costs, and governing law; as political winds shift, the parties agree that compliance targets remain unchanged; nothing herein is a silver bullet for execution risk.
